claim_number.description: Claim number is the HIPAA 835 transaction key — required for remittance reconciliation, ERA posting, and CMS audit trail; extraction errors break end-to-end payment workflow

patient_member_id.description: Member ID links claim to eligibility and patient account; errors cause misposting, HIPAA EDI rejection, and patient billing failures

provider_npi.description: NPI is HIPAA-mandated provider identifier for claims submission and remittance; incorrect NPI causes ERA routing failures and CMS compliance issues

rendering_provider_npi.description: Rendering NPI required for split-billing and group practice remittance routing under HIPAA 5010; errors affect provider payment splits

billed_amount.description: Billed amount is the financial anchor for all remittance calculations — contractual adjustments, patient responsibility, and payer payment are all derived from this value; must be highly accurate

paid_amount.description: Paid amount drives cash posting to provider accounts receivable; extraction errors cause AR balance mismatches and potential fraud flag triggers

allowed_amount.description: Allowed amount validates contractual adjustment calculations and payer fee schedule compliance; important for revenue cycle analytics

patient_responsibility.description: Patient responsibility amount drives patient billing statements; errors cause patient disputes and No Surprises Act compliance exposure

claim_status.description: Claim status determines downstream workflow routing — paid claims to cash posting, denied to denial management, pending to follow-up queue; misclassification has significant operational impact

denial_reason_code.description: CARC denial reason code is required for automated appeals and denial trend reporting; lower threshold acceptable as codes may be in stamps or footnotes

procedure_codes.description: CPT/HCPCS codes link to fee schedule pricing, utilization management, and clinical analytics; incomplete extraction understates procedure mix reporting

diagnosis_codes.description: ICD-10 diagnosis codes support medical necessity validation and quality measure attribution; required for value-based care program reporting

date_of_service_from.description: Date of service is required for timely filing compliance tracking and coordination of benefits sequencing; errors cause COB and timely filing rule violations

payer_name.description: Payer name identifies the remitting entity for cash posting routing; lower threshold acceptable as payer may be identified by logo or ID rather than spelled-out name

service_facility_npi.description: Service facility NPI required for place-of-service-based reimbursement rules and quality reporting attribution; errors affect site-of-care analytics
